name: Polymarket MCP Server
what_it_does: Polymarket MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Polymarket's prediction markets — fetching current market prices and odds, retrieving market questions and conditions, accessing historical market data, and integrating Polymarket's crowd-sourced probability estimates into agent-driven forecasting and decision analysis workflows.
use_cases: Fetching prediction market odds from forecasting and analysis agents
Querying election and event market prices from political analysis agents
Accessing crypto/DeFi market sentiment from trading analysis agents
Building forecasting tools with crowdsourced probability data from research agents
Monitoring market-implied probabilities for risk assessment from analysis agents
Integrating prediction market signals into AI-driven decision frameworks
not_for: Placing bets or trading on Polymarket (data access primarily, check repo for trading features)
Teams in jurisdictions where prediction markets are restricted
Real-time price feeds requiring sub-second latency
best_when: An agent needs access to crowd-sourced probability estimates from Polymarket for forecasting, political analysis, or event probability assessment.
avoid_when: You need traditional financial market data, or operate in jurisdictions where prediction market data access is restricted.

auth.notes: Polymarket public API may not require authentication for read operations. Trading requires CLOB API key and crypto wallet. Check repository for current auth requirements.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Polymarket public API for market data is free
pricing.paid_tiers: None for data access; trading requires USDC funds
pricing.notes: Polymarket market data API is free. MCP server is free open source. Trading on platform requires USDC cryptocurrency.

performance.rate_limits: Polymarket API rate limits — check documentation

known_agent_gotchas: Polymarket availability restricted in some jurisdictions — check local regulations
Community MCP from individual developer — limited maintenance
Market IDs and conditions change frequently — hardcoded IDs will break
Prediction market data is probabilistic — agents must interpret odds correctly
Liquidity varies significantly across markets — low-liquidity markets may be noisy
API pagination required for full market lists
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. No auth required for public data. Community MCP. Prediction market data — consider jurisdiction restrictions. No personal financial data collected.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. No auth for public data. Community MCP. Jurisdiction compliance required.
